body.title: Granny: replace send-keys with bus envelope dispatch
body.result: Granny sends bus envelopes, processes handshake replies, DB watchdog for stale dispatched; _cc0_busy includes dispatched+acked; 19 tests; follow-on: worker-side IDLE listener
body.intention: I intend that Granny dispatches work via the bus so the handshake protocol catches lost dispatches instead of silently dropping them.
body.description:
Granny currently dispatches CC work via `tmux send-keys`, which is swallowed silently if CC is mid-response. Replace with a bus envelope sent to the worker's `comms://` address. Granny then: marks ticket `dispatched`; listens for 'got it' reply → marks `acked`; listens for 'started' reply → marks `in_progress`; listens for 'timeout' reply → marks `escalated`. If no 'got it' arrives within 3 minutes, Granny marks `escalated` directly (shim never received). Supersedes T-granny-send-keys-idle-check and T-granny-dispatched-set-ttl (dispatched_cycle.json mechanism is no longer needed once the bus handshake confirms delivery).

**Affected files:** `devices/granny/daemon.py` (_dispatch_cc0, run_once watchdog), `devices/granny/device.py`, `tests/igor/test_igor_datacenter_boot.py` or `tests/granny/` test suite
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every interface crossing (bus send, handshake reply received, escalation)
**Scope boundary:** Granny's dispatch and handshake-response logic only. BaseShim handshake protocol is T-shim-dispatch-handshake (gate). Queue statuses are T-queue-dispatched-status (gate). Do not touch cc_task_listener.py — it becomes redundant but removal is a separate ticket.
**Completion criteria:** Integration test: Granny dispatches a ticket via bus envelope; shim mock sends 'got it'; ticket status in queue goes `dispatched` → `acked`; shim mock sends 'started'; ticket goes `in_progress`. Timeout path: shim mock sends no reply; ticket goes `escalated` after 3-min watchdog fires. Log lines present at each transition.
